ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (a)-[:DIRECTED]->(c:Movie {released: 1976}),
    p3 = (b)-[:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {tagline: 'You're gonna need a bigger boat'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does Martin Scorsese’s directorial work from 1976 compare to his acting roles in *Taxi Driver*, and which critics’ reviews most prominently feature the tagline “You’re gonna need a bigger boat” in their assessments?

cypher:
MATCH (martin:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(movie1:Movie), (martin)-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie2:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"})
WHERE movie1.released = 1976
MATCH (martin)-[:DIRECTED]->(movie1:Movie)<-[:REVIEWED]-(critic:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(movie1)
WHERE movie1.tagline CONTAINS "You're gonna need a bigger boat"
RETURN movie1, movie2
